pullQuote: We document the day as it unfolds — without interference, without performance.

work.heading: Work
work.text: A selection of recent sessions across Italy and Europe.

approach.heading: Approach
approach.text: Quiet, present, and entirely without interference.

book.heading: Book
book.text: A limited number of commissions each year.

about.p1: Vow & Vision is the work of Ricco & Kaceli.
about.p2: We photograph weddings across Italy and Europe with a single focus: the image. Not the timeline, not the checklist — the moment of it.
about.p3: Our approach is quiet and present. We move without interruption, read atmosphere before it forms, and work in existing light wherever possible.
about.p4: The result is a body of work that holds.

experience.intro: Working with us is unhurried. We plan carefully, arrive early, and disappear into the day.
experience.preview: A selection of images within 24 hours of the wedding.
experience.delivery: Full edited gallery delivered within seven days.
experience.shortNotice: Availability for bookings with less than 30 days notice.
experience.closing: Every booking includes a pre-wedding consultation, print-ready files, and a private online gallery.

contact.intro: We take on a limited number of weddings each year. If you are considering us, we would like to hear from you.
